title: Crayon per-Doc sync checkpoint
description: Stored in each Google Doc's DeveloperMetadata (not in the repo). The Google side of divergence detection: records the commit the Doc was last synced to and the content hash at that sync.

branch.description: Branch this Doc is a working copy of.

path.description: Repo-relative path of the file/doc this checkpoint is for.

lastSyncCommitSha.description: Branch HEAD commit SHA at the last successful Pull/Push.

lastSyncContentHash.description: Hash of the Canonical Markdown content at the last sync; compared against a fresh export to detect local edits.
